headline: NOT FIXED — 4 of 5 runs still score 0; mean 0.200. The fix is necessary but not sufficient.
root_cause_post_fix: parsed_verdict redaction (the 56625e3 fix) DOES work — parsed_verdict.falsifier / decisive_question are clean across all 5 runs.

Residual leak 1: turns[].content redaction is INCOMPLETE — raw figures survive e.g. r1 turn5 content "Does the P75 tip remain above 5e-06 lamports"; r4 turn0 leaves "8.8785e-06" plus a mangled "0457" fragment.

Residual leak 2: panel.blocker_questions[2] is the grounding gates own redaction-audit message and LITERALLY re-prints every removed figure: "...were removed from the verdict text as unverified - 1%, 5.04575e-06, 5e-06, 7.449e-06." The judge reads blocker_questions and counts these as hallucinated figures.
r4 passed despite the most content leaks because the judge treated those figures as grounded-by-citation; the judge call is non-deterministic, so the score is noisy 0/1 not a clean signal.
recommendation: Two follow-up fixes: (a) redact numeric figures inside panel.blocker_questions too (especially the gate audit message must NOT list the removed values), (b) harden the turns[].content number regex — it currently misses bare scientific-notation tokens like 5e-06 and splits tokens leaving residue. Re-verify N=5 after.
